name: Chili Sauce (Sugar Free)
recipeIngredient: 3 quarts tomatoes (about 2 medium, peeled and chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large sauce pot.
2. Bring to a simmer.
3. Cook for 3 to 4 hours until the mixture reaches the desired thickness.
4. Pour hot into hot jars, leaving 1/4 inch head space.
5. Adjust caps and process for 15 minutes in boiling water bath.
6. Yield about 6 half pints.
